notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Joey Loperfido. Pedro Pagés to 3rd. Pedro Pagés advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Joey Loperfido.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Christian Walker reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes pops out to first baseman Alec Burleson in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Pagés GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés grounds into a double play, third baseman Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Nathan Church out at 2nd. Pedro Pagés out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera plunked
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera hit by pitch. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Christian Walker reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson.
